decisions.title: Make .agents canonical governance source
decisions.summary: All governance authoring occurs under .agents; AGENTS.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md are synchronized mirrors.

decisions.title: Contract-first policy enforcement
decisions.summary: Normative rules move to contract YAML with rule IDs; instructions only interpret.

decisions.title: Favor canonical exports and remove dead aliases quickly
decisions.summary: Duplicate export names are consolidated to a single canonical surface, and orphan transaction/select/helper modules are removed once reachability is confirmed.

decisions.title: Adopt staged hosted-first visualizer image editing
decisions.summary: Visualizer generation defaults to hosted Hugging Face reference-guided image editing and preserves a provider boundary for future richer multi-reference control.

decisions.title: Promote VisualizerUpload to first-class persistence model
decisions.summary: Previews now reference owner-scoped uploads through uploadId instead of embedding source image lifecycle inside preview records.

decisions.title: Use authenticated Cloudinary assets with server-signed delivery for visualizer media
decisions.summary: User uploads and generated previews persist Cloudinary authority fields and are delivered through signed application routes rather than public secure_url links.

decisions.title: Replace texture-era visualizer contract with hero-plus-gallery references
decisions.summary: Catalog no longer treats visualizer_texture or visualizer_mask_hint as canonical publish or handoff requirements; the visualizer consumes active hero and gallery imagery only.

open_questions.question: Should CI enforce AGENTS and .github/copilot-instructions byte equality?
Does hosted Hugging Face quality remain sufficient for multi-reference wrap fidelity, or should a richer custom control pipeline be scheduled next?
